creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Blob Wars : Blob And Conquer is a 3D shooter with some puzzles.
It is the second in the Blobwars series.
The Blobs' homeworld is still littered with the alien forces and Bob
once again makes it his task to lead the counter attack.
It is significant in being Parallel Realities first OpenGL game.

WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/blobandconquer/

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean

Can't give build log, because RedPorts not works at the time.
